inline.neutral: Spawn a worker agent with the following prompt

inline.neutral: The parallel agent teams feature must be enabled
inline.adapted: Subagents must be available for parallel execution

sections.parallel-dispatch:
Dispatch review agents as subagents when explicitly requested.
Each agent runs in its own context.
If subagents are not available, execute all review perspectives sequentially.
sections.agent-teams:
Verify that subagent support is available for parallel execution.
If not available, fall back to sequential execution.
sections.agent-teams-dispatch:
**Codex**: Use subagents when explicitly requested. Each subagent handles an independent task group.

**Fallback (no parallel mechanism)**: Execute tasks sequentially in the current session.
sections.agent-teams-research-dispatch:
**Codex**: Use subagents for parallel research when available.

**Fallback (no parallel mechanism)**: Research all topics sequentially in the current session.
sections.worktree-isolation:
Spex worktrees are managed via `git worktree add` and `git worktree remove` commands.
Always use git commands directly for worktree operations.

fallback_note: > **Note:** This capability is not available on Codex. {fallback_text}
